name: ios_pentest
description: iOS penetration testing: IPA static analysis, binary protections, ATS/Info.plist checks, Frida SSL bypass, keychain dumping, iOS CVE assessment
author: 0xb0rn3 | github.com/0xb0rn3

optional_dependencies.libimobiledevice: Device comms (ideviceinfo, ideviceinstaller) — apt install libimobiledevice-utils
optional_dependencies.frida: Runtime instrumentation + SSL bypass — pip3 install frida-tools
optional_dependencies.objection: Automated Frida pentest framework — pip3 install objection
optional_dependencies.class-dump: ObjC class extraction from unencrypted binaries — brew install class-dump
optional_dependencies.jtool2: Binary analysis (PIE, encryption, entitlements) — download from jtool.io
optional_dependencies.otool: Binary protections (built into macOS Xcode tools)
optional_dependencies.plutil: Plist conversion to JSON (built into macOS)
optional_dependencies.sshpass: Password-based SSH to jailbroken device — apt install sshpass
optional_dependencies.frida-ios-dump: IPA extraction from encrypted apps — pip3 install frida-ios-dump

ssh_host.description: IP of jailbroken device for SSH access

operations.recon: Fingerprint device via libimobiledevice (iOS version, model, jailbreak detection)
operations.app_scan: Static analysis of IPA: Info.plist, binary protections, class-dump, secrets
operations.vuln_scan: Full device + app vulnerability assessment including iOS CVE checks
operations.exploit: Dynamic exploitation: Frida SSL bypass, URL scheme injection
operations.full: Complete pentest: recon + app_scan + vuln_scan + exploit + forensics

prerequisites.non_jailbroken: ideviceinfo + local IPA file — static analysis and CVE checks only
prerequisites.jailbroken: + SSH root access (checkra1n/unc0ver/palera1n) — keychain dump, FS access, Frida
prerequisites.frida_server: frida-server must be running on device for dynamic instrumentation

notes: ⚠️  AUTHORIZATION REQUIRED: Only test apps and devices you have explicit permission to test
💡 Provide ipa_path for static-only analysis without a connected device
💡 Use ssh_host + ssh_pass for jailbroken device deep testing
💡 Default SSH credentials for common jailbreaks: root/alpine (change immediately after JB)
🔒 Keychain dumps contain real user credentials — handle responsibly
